steps.text: Review the ADS offer-letter-standard guidance in the ADS Documents reference and extract required structure, mandatory clauses, and fixed defaults (including Pakistan-labour-law-specific requirements).

Draft the full ADS standard employment offer letter for Sara Khan as a Data Analyst, inserting ADS fixed defaults and marking all unspecified variables (start date, compensation, reporting line, etc.) as [BLANK].

Cross-check the draft against the ADS offer-letter checklist / hardened validation items (placeholders, jurisdiction, governing law, at-will or local-equivalent language, IP/confidentiality references, disclaimer).
Prepare the final attorney-review-ready markdown version of the offer letter, ensuring the attorney-review disclaimer is included and formatting is clean.
